name: Gimme Golf - Clearfield
about: Gimme Golf operates as a high-tech golf simulator venue with two locations in Utah, Kaysville and Clearfield. The facility provides a casual, indoor environment for playing virtual golf on world-class courses using real clubs and balls. It offers a mix of walk-in sessions and various membership plans, with a BYO food and drink policy, making it suitable for relaxed social play. The experience is centered on access to premium simulation technology in a laid-back lounge setting, accommodating both seasoned golfers and first-timers.
why_golfers_like_it: Bring your own food, drinks, and music for a private experience
Massive screens and high-tech simulator tracking for accurate play

food_and_drink.notes: BYO food and drink policy, allowing customers to bring their own snacks and meals.
BYO alcohol is allowed, though on-site options are not mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are encouraged to bring your own clubs, balls, and tees to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue has a BYO food and drink policy, allowing you to bring your own snacks, meals, and beverages to enjoy while you play.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole session typically takes about one hour, as booking is done in one-hour increments.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state its policy on children, but its casual environment and BYO food policy suggest it can accommodate families.
